sizing_rule.note: Position size = (base_equity / $4000) × (baseline_vol / current_vol)^0.5. Scales inversely with 20-period historical volatility to equalize risk contribution across instruments with different volatility profiles. Max position ratio 0.75.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size according to instrument volatility rather than using a fixed unit-per-equity ratio, so that different instruments with different risk profiles contribute equally to portfolio risk.
